text: Here, in the softly luminous corridor and the imaginative space beyond the glass, I feel a subtle tension between mystery and curiosity. The emptiness of the first scene is sharply contrasted by the intellectual invitation of the "R+D" wall. The play of light, text, and technology hint at innovation, yet I sense a quiet solitude. Am I on the threshold of discovery or just a silent observer hoping for connection? The spaces feel charged with potential, both unsettling and inspiring.
